writing.title: Writing Task 1: A shopping list
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) listing what you need to buy, using a/an, some, many, how many.
writing.sampleAnswer: I have an apple and some bananas. I have some tomatoes, maybe five or six. We need three eggs for the cake. Let's buy some onions too.
checklist: Dùng a/an cho danh từ số ít
Dùng some cho số nhiều không xác định
Có ít nhất 1 số lượng cụ thể (three, five...)

writing.title: Writing Task 1: What's in the kitchen
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing food at home, using some, much, how much.
writing.sampleAnswer: I have some rice for dinner, maybe two kilos. There isn't much water in the bottle. I need a little sugar for the cake, just two spoons.
checklist: Dùng some với danh từ không đếm được
Dùng much trong câu phủ định
Không thêm -s vào danh từ không đếm được
